sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36721" key="e)camusti/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξᾰμυστίζω</orth>, <sense id="n36721.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drink off at a draught,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:189" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">189</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
